site.name: Velvet Lounge
site.description: Velvet Lounge is an intimate nightclub in the heart of Nocturne Bay, blending signature cocktails, deep house, and velvet-lit interiors for late-night conversations and dance-floor moments.

hero.title: Velvet Lounge
hero.headline: A velvet-lit night for
hero.subheadline: Signature cocktails, curated DJs, and a low-light lounge atmosphere until late. Reserve your table and arrive when the lights are already dim.

about.title: About
about.description: Hidden just off Nocturne Bay’s Old Quarter streets, Velvet Lounge is built for long nights, small groups, and good sound. A room tuned for deep house, disco, and electronic sets with just enough energy to keep you until closing.

events.title: Upcoming
events.subtitle: Rotating DJs, themed nights, and one-off takeovers.

items.name: Velvet Fridays
items.description: Warm-up grooves and deep cuts until late. Ideal for small groups and bottle service.

items.name: Midnight Stories
items.description: House & disco selections with a focus on groove, not volume.

items.name: Industry Night
items.description: A slower Thursday for F&B and hospitality people with extended happy hour.

vip.title: VIP Tables &
vip.subtitle: Arrive when the room is already tuned. We’ll take care of the rest.
vip.description: Priority entrance, reserved seating, and a dedicated host for your night. Choose the table that fits your group and let us handle the flow.
perks: Mixers included with all bottle packages

packages.name: Velvet Table
packages.description: Perfect for small groups who want a base and bottle service without the spotlight.

packages.name: Lounge Corner
packages.description: Corner lounge seating with line of sight to the DJ booth.

packages.name: Velvet Room
packages.description: For bigger celebrations that need the best seats in the room.

vip.note: Prices and availability vary by night. We’ll confirm your reservation and minimum spend by WhatsApp.

menu.title: Signature
menu.subtitle: Cocktails built for low light and late-night stories.

signatureCocktails.name: Velvet Sour
signatureCocktails.description: Whisky, hibiscus, citrus, and a velvet foam finish.

signatureCocktails.name: Old Town Negroni
signatureCocktails.description: House-blend gin, bitters, and a subtle smoke.

signatureCocktails.name: Midnight Fizz
signatureCocktails.description: Vodka, elderflower, citrus, soda, and a violet twist.

signatureCocktails.name: Low Light Spritz
signatureCocktails.description: Aperitif, prosecco, and a darker, berry-forward profile.

gallery.title: Inside
gallery.subtitle: Mood, lights, and just enough haze.

location.title: Find
location.subtitle: Tucked just off the main Old Town streets.
location.address: 12 Velvet Row, Nocturne Bay, CA 94107, Luminaria
location.mapLabel: Velvet Lounge — Old Quarter, Nocturne Bay

reservation.title: Book a
reservation.subtitle: Tell us who’s coming and when. We’ll confirm details by WhatsApp or email.

expectations.title: What happens next:
items: You’ll get a reply within 24 hours.
We’ll confirm your table, time, and minimum spend.
For last-minute bookings, please call or WhatsApp.

footer.disclaimer: Velvet Lounge promotes responsible enjoyment. Entry strictly 21+ with valid ID.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Velvet Lounge. All rights reserved. Please drink responsibly.
